searchHero.title: Stop looking for a restaurant - find it.
searchHero.subtitle: Discover the best local businesses, curated just for you.
searchHero.searchPlaceholder: Search for restaurants, cuisines, or locations...

info_cards.be_first_review: Be the first to leave a review

timing.subtitle: Plan your visit around our schedule. We're open weekly to serve you best.
timing.no_hours: No opening hours have been configured for this business yet.

contact.subtitle: Have questions or want to make a special request? We're here to help you make your visit perfect.
contact.social_subtitle: Stay updated with our latest news, events and daily specials.

error.title: Error
error.message: We couldn't load the business profile. It might be private or doesn't exist.

order_modal.geolocation_unsupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser
order_modal.location_error: Could not determine your location. Please enable location permissions.
order_modal.too_far: You are too far away to order. Maximum distance is {{maxDist}}m, but you are {{dist}}m away.
order_modal.order_pending_confirmation: Your order is pending confirmation from the staff.
order_modal.order_placed_success: Your order has been placed successfully.
order_modal.location_required_desc: This business only allows orders from nearby guests (within 500m).

reserve_modal.generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
reserve_modal.received_message_prefix: Your reservation for {{tableName}} on {{date}} at {{time}} is currently
reserve_modal.keep_eye: Keep an eye on your email/phone for the confirmation notice.

table_reservation.section_subtitle: Select your preferred date and time to see available tables. We'll make sure everything is ready for your arrival.
table_reservation.try_different_time: Try a different time or party size.
table_reservation.select_date_time_prompt: Please select a date and time to view available tables.
table_reservation.no_tables_configured: No tables configured for this venue yet.

floor_plan.no_floor_plan_desc: The venue hasn't set up their floor plan yet.
floor_plan.select_prompt: Select a date & time above to see availability
floor_plan.controls_hint: Scroll to zoom · Drag to pan · Pinch on mobile

reviews.title: What Guests Say
reviews.subtitle: Hear from our community about their experiences{{atBusiness}}. Verified reviews from recent visits.
reviews.delete_desc: This will permanently remove your review.
reviews.be_first: Be the first to leave a review!
reviews.only_visited_error: You can only review businesses you've visited.
reviews.already_reviewed_error: You already have a review. Editing it instead.
reviews.submit_failed_error: Failed to submit review. Please try again.

user_history.cancel_window_error: Cannot cancel within the cancellation window.
user_history.business_not_accepting_orders: This business isn't accepting orders right now.
user_history.order_not_found_error: This order could not be found.
user_history.item_out_of_stock: {{itemName}} is out of stock (need {{required}}, only {{available}} available).
user_history.ingredient_out_of_stock: {{menuItemName}} can't be made — {{ingredientName}} is out of stock (need {{required}}, only {{available}} available).
user_history.reorder_failed: Failed to place reorder. Please try again.
user_history.no_orders_yet: No orders yet at this business.
user_history.no_reservations_yet: No reservations yet at this business.
user_history.cancel_reservation_desc: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation? This cannot be undone.
